$comment: Self-run loop configuration (single source of truth for ignition). Extend the run by editing untilIso on ONE line - the Task Scheduler is never re-registered. loop-launcher.ps1 reads this at every logon and every day at 07:00. Mutable runtime state (lastCriticIso) lives in the gitignored loop-state.json, NOT here, so the ops lane's clean-tree contract is never broken. See docs/fable-diagnosis-2026-07-02/O16-implementation-notes.md.
